note: A monster the MM stats as TABLES (dragon, cacodemon, elemental) or as a modifier of an existing creature (vampire thrall). The entry's template block ships authored grid geometry (never values), axis wiring, an optional rolled ability menu (d100 bands are structure, like roll-table ranges), and a nameFormat. The binding materializes an acks-lib.template generator actor from the reader's own book.
